privileged_info_summary: The docker_ci_pipeline task is a synthetic benchmark that tests CI/CD pipeline creation for a Flask 3.0.0 application on Python 3.11-slim. The task requires building a containerized pipeline with 4 sequential stages (lint, test, security, package) outputting artifacts to /home/ga/projects/webapp/ci-output. The final image tag is webapp:production with a 200MB size limit. All application code, dependencies (flask==3.0.0, gunicorn==21.2.0, pytest==7.4.3, flake8==6.1.0, bandit==1.7.5), routes including /health on port 8000, and test files are dynamically generated by the setup script. Verification requires all 5 artifacts (lint-report.txt, test-results.txt, coverage.txt, security-scan.txt, pipeline-summary.txt) with a passing score of 60+ points out of 100.
